title: FDA Approval for Denali Therapeutics Blazes a New Trail for Brain-Penetrating Drugs
summary:
Denali Therapeutics’ Avlayah received FDA approval for treating Hunter syndrome, a rare neurological disorder. The biologic medicine uses Denali’s proprietary drug delivery technology to cross the protective blood-brain barrier. 
The post FDA Approval for Denali Therapeutics Blazes a New Trail for Brain-Penetrating Drugs appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Denali Therapeutics의 뇌 침투성 약물이 FDA 승인을 받으며 새로운 길을 열었다.

title: BYD And VinFast Race To Dominate Southeast Asia's EV Market
summary:
BYD And VinFast Race To Dominate Southeast Asia's EV Market

            BYD and VinFast are rapidly expanding their presence in Southeast Asia, where electric vehicles are gaining traction and competition is intensifying, according to Nikkei. Both companies have emerged as the fastest-growing car brands in the region’s six largest markets in 2025, with sales rising about 95% for BYD and 90% for VinFast compared with the previous year.

VinFast sold more than 100,000 vehicles across countries in
summary_ko: BYD와 VinFast가 동남아시아 전기차 시장에서 경쟁을 벌이고 있습니다. 전기차 시장이 성장하고 있습니다.

title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium — which one analyst described as a "steal" — may leave room for a competing bid.
summary_ko: Merck는 Terns를 6.7억 달러에 인수하여 구별되는 백혈병 약물에 대한 베팅을 했습니다. 이 거래는 Novartis의 Scemblix와 경쟁할 수 있는 약물을 Merck에 제공할 수 있습니다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro와의 거래를 통해 1.7억 달러를 자율 면역 질환의 비스펙시픽스에 베팅했습니다. 이 거래는 Gilead에 BCMA와 CD3를 대상으로 하는 항체를 제공할 수 있습니다.

title: Recordati says it's received a $12B+ takeover bid
summary:
Milan-based Recordati confirmed Thursday that it has received a buyout offer north of $12 billion.

 The company said in a press release that private equity firm CVC Capital Partners has submitted ...
summary_ko: Recordati가 120억 달러 이상의 인수 제안을 받았다. 이는 바이오테크 산업에서 큰 변화가 일어나고 있는 상황에서 나온 뉴스이다.

title: Limbic aims to show AI beats humans in delivering therapy
summary:
A March study in Nature Medicine showed that AI designed for therapy can deliver better care than human clinicians in a specific type of therapy.

 UK-based Limbic led the study. The ...
summary_ko: Limbic이 인공지능을 이용한 치료가 인간보다 더 좋은 치료를 제공할 수 있다는 연구 결과를 발표했다. 이는 인공지능 기술이 의료 분야에서 큰 기회를 제공하는 상황에서 나온 뉴스이다.

title: Oral peptides biotech Pinnacle Medicines gets $89M from US, China investors
summary:
The pill version of Novo Nordisk's blockbuster Wegovy showed what was possible when drug chemists turned peptides into oral molecules. Now investors have found their next related bet.

 Pinnacle Medicines, a two-year-old startup based in ...
summary_ko: 경구 펩타이드 바이오테크 회사인 Pinnacle Medicines가 미국과 중국 투자자로부터 8,900만 달러를 투자받았다.

title: STAT+: Allogene’s off-the-shelf CAR-T is nearing an early but pivotal study readout
summary: A preliminary readout from a study could vindicate Allogene Therapeutics' stubborn belief in its off-the-shelf CAR-T treatment.
summary_ko: Allogene의 CAR-T 치료제가 임상시험에서 초기 nhưng 중요한 결과를 나타낼 수 있습니다. 이는 CAR-T 치료제의 발전에 중요한 단계입니다.

title: FDA clears Denali drug in ‘clear step’ for rare disease biotechs
summary: The approval of Denali’s Hunter syndrome treatment, Avlayah, comes after a series of drug rejections and delays that had led to criticism of the FDA’s stance on rare disease therapies.
summary_ko: FDA가 Denali의 드문 질병 치료제를 승인했습니다. 이는 드문 질병 치료제에 대한 FDA의 입장이 바뀐 것을 나타냅니다.

title: Sarepta sees early success with RNAi drugs from Arrowhead
summary: Long-awaited results from Phase 1/2 studies lifted Sarepta’s stock and, according to the company, suggest potential for two medicines to treat muscle-weakening conditions.
summary_ko: Sarepta는 Arrowhead의 RNAi 약물에 대한 초기 성공을 보였습니다. 이 결과는 두 가지 약물이 근무력 질환을 치료할 수 있는 잠재력을 보여주었습니다.

title: CMR Surgical kicks off Versius Plus robot’s US commercial launch
summary: Following FDA approval last December for its upgraded robot, CMR Surgical has begun rolling out its Versius Plus platform in the U.S.
summary_ko: CMR Surgical은 FDA 승인을 받은 후 Versius Plus 로봇의 미국 상업적 출시를 시작했습니다.

title: Philips AI cath lab copilot nets FDA clearance
summary: Developed with Edwards Lifesciences, DeviceGuide is aimed at the challenging task of transcatheter mitral valve repair.
summary_ko: Philips의 AI 카테터 실험실 Copilot는 FDA 승인을 받았습니다. 이 시스템은 Edwards Lifesciences와 함께 개발되었으며, 심장 판막 수리를 위한 도전적인 작업을 지원하는 데 사용될 수 있습니다.

title: FDA approves Denali's Hunter syndrome drug, handing rare disease community a win
summary: The FDA has approved Denali Therapeutics’ enzyme replacement therapy for a genetic lysosomal storage disease after a string of high-profile rejections for rare disease candidates.
summary_ko: FDA는 Denali Therapeutics의 헌터 증후군 치료제를 승인하여 희귀병 치료제 개발에 대한 기대를 높였습니다. 이는 생명공학 산업에서 희귀병 치료제 개발의 중요성을 강조합니다.

title: UCB picks Georgia for $2B biologics site; AbbVie exec visits China
summary: UCB has selected Gwinnett County, GA, as the location for its new biologics factory. The 460,000-square-foot facility is expected to cost $2 billion and will supply biologics to the US market ...
summary_ko: UCB가 조지아에 20억 달러의 바이오로직스 공장을 건설할 계획이다. 이는 미국 바이오테크 산업에서 큰 투자가 이루어지고 있는 상황에서 나온 뉴스이다.

title: Kodiak’s Phase 3 eye drug success; Innate discontinues anti-CD20 program
summary:
Plus, news about Astellas' setidegrasib and Anavex:

 📈 Kodiak’s eye drug win: The biotech’s experimental drug Zenkuda, whose scientific name is tarcocimab tedromer, beat a sham procedure in patients ...
summary_ko: Kodiak의 안약이 3상 시험에서 성공했다. 이는 안과 치료제 개발에서 새로운 기회가 열리는 상황에서 나온 뉴스이다.

title: Frozen Does Not Mean Stable: Rethinking Cryopreservation in Cell and Gene Therapy Manufacturing
summary:
As cell-based therapies grow more complex and manufacturing networks expand, resilience can’t be an afterthought, and cryopreservation can no longer just be a step that gets validated during development and left alone. It needs to play an ongoing role in product consistency, potency, and reliability.
The post Frozen Does Not Mean Stable: Rethinking Cryopreservation in Cell and Gene Therapy Manufacturing appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 세포 및 유전자 치료 제조에서 동결 보존의 중요성이 강조되고 있다.
